positive: Minimalist graphic design featuring a stylized astronaut floating in a cosmic void. The astronaut's silhouette is composed of clean, thick lines, embodying retro-futurism. The background utilizes deep sapphire blues, nebula purples, and subtle starry white flecks, creating a strong contrast against the central figure. The composition is perfectly balanced and centered, ideal for screen printing on fabric. Use halftone dot patterns and geometric overlays to enhance the vintage space-age poster aesthetic. High contrast, clean vectors, crisp details, pop art feel, graphic novel style.
negative: blurry, grainy, realistic photography, logo, text, signature, watermark, dirty, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low resolution, poor contrast
